summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EGM Content Lab feature - a specialized platform for analyzing SWF files, binary inspection, and content registry management. All three major capabilities working correctly including SWF analysis with ActionScript extraction, hex dump viewer, and content registration workflow.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests: 107/107 endpoints passing (100% success rate) including 9 new Content Lab endpoints
Content Lab page loads at /content-lab with three-tab layout: SWF Analyzer, Binary Inspector, Content Registry
Content Lab appears in sidebar navigation with proper icon and highlighting
SWF Analyzer: File upload working with real SWF file (file1.crdownload, 29,235 bytes)
SWF Analyzer: Analysis results showing SWF v5, compression status, string extraction (959 strings)
SWF Analyzer: Auto-suggested UGG canonical event mappings with confidence scores (11 mappings found)
SWF Analyzer: Categories classification working (slot, bonus, player_tracking, financial, system)
SWF Analyzer: ActionScript patterns detection and embedded fonts extraction
SWF Analyzer: Register to Content Registry integration working
Binary Inspector: Hex dump viewer with offset/hex/ASCII columns display
Binary Inspector: File upload and hex generation working (29,235 bytes total)
Binary Inspector: Pagination controls (Prev/Next) working correctly
Content Registry: Registration form with all fields (name, game title, manufacturer, type, version)
Content Registry: Content list display with status indicators (registered/deployed)
Content Registry: Content row selection and detail view working
Content Registry: Stats display showing content packages and analyses count
Content Registry: Recent analyses sidebar showing historical data
Fixed JavaScript error: categories data structure mapping issue resolved
All three tabs switching and panel rendering working correctly
Integration between SWF analysis and content registration workflow functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (107/107 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all Content Lab features working)
